prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-TCFPKCB12IX15I-2PC-OPQ-2PACK-WSH Product Type: CUTTING_BOARD Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: 2 Pack Thin Clear Flexible Plastic Kitchen Cutting Board 12 Inch x 15 Inch Description: Tired of your old useless cutting boards? Try these new flexible cutting boards.

These boards provide a great surface for cutting and preparing fish, carving meat, slicing fruits and vegetables. They will protect your counter tops during food preparation and best of all, they're dishwasher safe.

These universal cutting boards can also be used as a cutting surface for arts and craft projects, quilting and more. They roll up quickly for easy storage when not in use, and each features a hole for convenient hanging. They measure 12" x 15" - perfect for any kitchen or crafting area. Search Terms: best kitchen cutting board thin flexible clear plastic chopping mat non slip folding stove top oven food prep cutting boards for kitchen meal plastic chopping mat dish washer safe kitchen cutting mat home chef slicing food safe cutting board arts Features: - Size: 12 inch x 15 inch | Thickness: .5mm - Material: PP Plastic - Dishwasher Safe - Hole for Hanging - Rolls up for Quick and Easy Storage === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 2-Pack 12x15 Clear Flexible Plastic Cutting Board

openai.item_name: Beille 2-pk 12" x 15" Clear Flexible Cutting Board

anthropic.title_differentiation: 2-Pack, 12 Inch X 15 Inch, Dishwasher Safe, Rolls Up For Storage, Hanging Hole, Non-Slip Surface

openai.title_differentiation: 05Mm Thin, Dishwasher Safe, Rolls Up For Storage, Hanging Hole, PP Plastic, Protects Counters, Multiuse Food Prep
